description.zh-Hans: 生成适用于像素艺术的基础几何形状（圆形、矩形、菱形、多边形、自定义）。自定义绘制形状从导出的点列表解析并确定性栅格化，确保节点输出与绘制的几何形状一致。
description.en: Generates basic geometric shapes (circle, rectangle, diamond, polygon, custom) suitable for pixel art. Custom-drawn shapes are interpreted from exported point lists and rasterized deterministically so node output matches the drawn geometry.

triggers.zh-Hans: 形状, 几何形状, 圆形, 矩形, 多边形, 星形
triggers.en: shape, geometric shape, circle, rectangle, polygon, star

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成一个带描边的圆形，用作像素艺术中的按钮或装饰元素。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a circle with stroke for use as a button or decorative element in pixel art.
